title: Bridge Essay: Distinct neural mechanisms support inner speaking and inner hearing.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Distinct neural mechanisms support inner speaking and inner hearing.**. Cortex.. PMID: 37922641. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2023.09.007. Humans have the ability to mentally examine speech. This covert form of speech production is often accompanied by sensory (e.g., auditory) percepts. However, the cognitive and neural mechanisms that generate these percepts are still debated. According to aprominent proposal, inner speech has at least two distinct phenomenological components: inner speaking and inner hearing.
